chapter goal: Which Euclidean-looking pictures change their meaning inside the hyperbolic disk?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 26 is represented by hyperbolic diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.

visual sequence.expected_observation: Boundary data controls disk geodesics, distances, and model changes.
visual sequence.learner_inspection_target: For Chapter 26, inspect hyperbolic circles, horocycles, and hypercycles by identifying which objects instantiate circles and cycles in the poincare disk.
visual sequence.library: numpy, matplotlib, local projective/conic/Cayley-Klein helpers, and self-contained HTML
visual sequence.validation_target: Poincare distance is positive and disk artifacts are nonblank
